subject: FW: Christmas Party Invitation
body:
-----Original Message-----
From: pat@asrlab.org [mailto:pat@asrlab.org] 
Sent: Monday, December 10, 2007 5:24 PM
To: Helen Kim
Subject: Christmas Party Invitation

Jeffrey Epstein,

Attached please find invitation to Rhonda's Christmas Party.  We hope
you
and your spouse or guest can join us!

Best regards,
Pat





Patricia Shannon
Assistant to Rhonda R. Shearer
Tel:  212-925-8812
Fax:  212-925-0459
Email: pat@asrlab.org
